# Kone Academy

> The multidisciplinary technology collective specializing in Academic Research, Software Engineering, and Industrial IoT solutions.

Kone Academy (KCA) operates a federated ecosystem of subdomains, each serving as a dedicated division for research, development, education, and commerce.

## Core Ecosystem & Subdomains

- [Kone Academy Home](https://www.koneacademy.io/) - The main landing page and entry point.
- [Kone Consult](https://consult.koneacademy.io/) - Academic research, data analysis, report writing, and professional mentorship.
- [Kone Code](https://code.koneacademy.io/) - Custom software engineering, web application development, and open-source contributions.
- [Kone Lab](https://lab.koneacademy.io/) - Industrial IoT prototyping, hardware design, and embedded systems engineering.
- [Kone Kids](https://kids.koneacademy.io/) - Hands-on STEM education, robotics, and creative coding pathways for children.
- [Kone Shop](https://shop.koneacademy.io/) - E-commerce store for IoT telemetry kits, STEM learning materials, and official merchandise.
- [Kone Warp](https://warp.koneacademy.io/) - Rapid transit, dispatch logistics, and smart fleet management portal.
- [Kone Digital](https://digital.koneacademy.io/) - Visual design, digital branding, and UI/UX engineering.
- [Kone AI](https://ai.koneacademy.io/) - Specialized machine learning models, agentic workflows, and LLM orchestration research.

## Core Pillars & Philosophy

1. **Academic Rigor**: Bridging the gap between scientific theory and practical engineering through peer-reviewed methodologies.
2. **Constructionist Pedagogy**: Learning by making, physical computing (e.g., micro:bit, Arduino), and real-world community problem-solving.
3. **Open-Source Contribution**: Standardizing open-source licenses, public repositories, and collaborative development.
4. **Security by Design**: Enforcing strict SAST scans (Snyk) and secure-coding practices from inception.
